description: A color photograph of a man in a dark blazer and open-collar white shirt shaking hands with and speaking to uniformed officers wearing U.S. Customs and Border Protection patches, with more officers and flags in the background. A black band across the bottom carries a Department of Homeland Security seal with white serif text reading HONOR AND REMEMBER and an italic line reading National Police Week 2026.
notable_text: HONOR AND REMEMBER; National Police Week 2026; U.S. CUSTOMS AND BORDER PROTECTION
